eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Crow Wing; Aitkin; Cass; Mille Lacs; Morrison, MN; at 9:31 AM on OCT 14, 2019 Effective until 10:31 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is a Test from the Crow Wing County Sheriff's Office. This is only a Test.
